mood: Authoritative, Magazine-like, High-end Real Estate, Magical AI
design_philosophy: A complete rejection of standard SaaS look. This is an 'Architectural Digest' magazine cover mixed with brutalist engineering. Bold, asymmetric, and incredibly premium.

rules: Use Playfair Display (Italicized heavily) for massive, high-contrast H1s and statement quotes.
Use Outfit for section headings, structural labels, and UI numbers.
Use DM Sans for body text.
Use JetBrains Mono inside the AI output box to give that raw, 'generation in progress' terminal feel.
BANNED: Inter, Roboto, Lato, Space Grotesk.
Base background is a warm architectural white/oat (#F4F3EF).
Primary CTA and 'exploding' UI elements use pure vermillion red (#FF3B22).
No purple gradients. No soft shadows. Use sharp 1px borders (#121212 at 15% opacity).

layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for sections. Padding within containers should be massive (p-8 or p-12).
layout.grid: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid) for features. Never fill 100% perfectly, leave some cells completely empty for negative space.
layout.surface: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. Containers should have border-collapse style layouts with sharp 1px borders.

components.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Solid #FF3B22 for primary with high-contrast text. Add group-hover translate effects.
components.cards: Cardless or sharp 1px border. Background matches parent (no white cards on gray bg unless structurally separated).
components.ai_playground: Bento-style layout. Tabbed output for platforms (MLS, Instagram, Facebook, Email). Tone selector pills (Luxury, Cozy, Modern) should be stark outlined badges. Live copy generation feel.
components.nav: Sticky header. Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#F4F3EF]/70 border-b border-black/10.
components.upsell_card: $20 PDF guide upsell must look like a physical blueprint or premium editorial card, dark-themed (#0A0A0A) to stand out from the light theme.

interactions.hover: Text color explicitly set on hover. Interactive elements shift -translate-y-1.
interactions.animations: Framer motion for staggered entrances. AI generation should look like text is streaming/typing out.

images.description: Modern building with a green lawn. Use as the hero section background with a bg-black/30 or bg-[#F4F3EF]/80 gradient overlay.
White luxury car parked in front of modern white house.
White modern building with mountains in the background.
Abstract architectural lines. Use as a low-opacity background texture in the AI playground section.

media.logos: Use pure text components stylized for eXp, KW, RE/MAX using typography. NO placeholders like via.placeholder.com.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load fonts from Google Fonts: Playfair Display, Outfit, DM Sans, JetBrains Mono.
Build a custom HTML/Tailwind hero section. Do not use generic Shadcn cards for the main layout. Build an asymmetrical bento grid.
Implement the AI Listing Rewriter as the core interactive element on the homepage. Use Shadcn Tabs for the output types (MLS, Instagram, FB, Email).
Tone Selector Pills should be highly visible and clickable, styled as rounded badges with a 1px border and hover effect.
Add purely decorative ASCII art or SVG lines referencing architectural blueprints in the background of the pricing or AI playground section.
For logos (eXp, KW, RE/MAX), create sharp typography-based logos if SVGs are missing. Do not use placeholder images.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
